title: Hippopotomonstrosesquippedaliophobia (Joke)
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Long words ahh!!}}__NOTOC__{{CSS|content= @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Libre+Caslon+Text'); /* Font */ html .resizable-container, .page-content h1, .page-content h2, .page-content h3, .page-content h4, .page-content h5, .page-content h6 { font-family: 'Libre Caslon Text'}} {{Joke}} == Description == Hippopotomonstrosesquippedaliophobia is an anomalous psychological disorder that affects wanderers in The Backrooms, causing unhealthinesses among them. Victims of it are said to feel immense fear towards lengthy words overreactively for no apparent or clear reason. Following the discovery of this phenomenon, long words starts appearing in walls of multiple levels transcendentally. Wanderers claimed to see the words written using black markers, mostly center around one area. Originally, people thought these markings possess unquestionablenesses that they were written by an abominable prankster, but more people made assumptions that they were naturally formed. == Causes == Psychoanalyzing patient's cranium electroencephalographically, neuropharmacologists believed the phenomenon is gradually developed by reading long words for too long. Hippopotomonstrosesquippedaliophobia can only be weakened through psychotherapies, unless the patient naturally develop hyperimmunization to it before contracting it. This phenomenon is generally known to be very hard to cure completely, similar to pneumonoultramicroscopicsilicovolcanoconiosis. Therefore, it is adviced to avoid doing certain actions which involves dealing with incomprehensibly long words or overemphasizing words. == Symtoms == === After 1-3 minutes === After being infected with hippopotomonstrosesquippedaliophobia, the victim loses the omnipotence to control their oral muscle, so the only way they can talk is through ventriloquizing. === After 3-10 minutes === At this point, the victim starts to experience hyperventilation, which disturbs their respiratory functions. They also become uncooperative and unmagnanimous with their doctors or caretakers because of their apprehension and narcissistic personality. === After 10-30 minutes === At the third stage, victims' behaviours start to vary in a disproportionable manner. For example, some victims had claimed to support antidisestablishmentarianism uncompromisingly, while some others claimed to undergo miniaturizations. Obviously, most of them are deemed to be speaking nonsensically due to the hypnotizing nature of the disorder. === After 1 hour === This is the final stage of hippopotomonstrosesquippedaliophobia, when it has been proven to be incurable. The victims unanthropomorphize and start scintillating, and are left to die on their own. == Log == Here's a note written using stenography, recording one of the scripts of a therapist trying to cure a hippopotomonstrosesquippedaliophobia patient.
Therapist: Hello patient! I'm your local mad therapist. What can I do for you? Any entity attacks that traumatized you? Or can you not withstand the liminality?

Patient: I think I have a fear of long words...

Therapist: Ahh! You have met the right person then, I'm the infamous quintessential sesquipedalian, an acquaintance who lives in Llanfairpwllgwyngyllgogerychwyrndrobwllllantysiliogogogoch.

Patient: AHHH!

Therapist: I feel like it's symptoms are really underpublicized, which gives me unsatisfactoriness. Especially since this is The Backrooms, all symptoms might be anomalous and are very hard to cure. But don't worry, my professionalism allows me to cure this quickly.

Patient: AHHHH!

Therapist: The symptoms include aggressivenesses, speaking floccinaucinihilipilification like having pseudopseudohypoparathyroidism or protesting overindustrialization, and causing inconveniences.

Patient: AHHHHH!

Therapist: Do you know which kind of medication you need?

Patient: Uhh, no?

Therapist: Decaffeinate you, then force feed you oxyphenbutazone.

Patient: AHH! What kind of medication is that?!

Therapist: Oh! I have a supercalifragilisticexpialidocious idea. I will isolate you in a prearranged room and write long words such as "thermoluminescences" in the interior. Okay?

Patient: NO! Absolutely not! *Starts foaming*

Therapist: This excellent idea will make me honorificabilitudinitatibus!

Patient: You should be fired!

Therapist: I'm very enthusiastic and passionate towards my job. Stop exaggerating! I know you're fine.

Patient: *Calms down* Wait what, I don't feel that much fear towards long words anymore.

Therapist: That's what exposure therapy can do to a man.
